description: CompositionBlack round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic print on the frontFittingRegularWash care Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent in warm water (maximum 40 degrees) Do not wring or bleach Flat dry in shade Do not iron on print Bring out the trendy fashionista side of you with this black graphic tee from the Power Puff range of jealous 21. The white silhouette girl on the front with the pink butterflies  is a tribute to the free 60's. Team this t-shirt with shorts and flip flops and feel like a flower child yourself.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.6", Chest-32"
